title: Assistant Store Manager - ProSport - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - ProSport - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Assistant Store Manager with drive and ambition, ProSport in Jabalpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About ProSport:
ProSport is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Planogram

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ProSport!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
